title: Photos: Earthquakes Strike Venezuela

title: Representative Tom Kean, Missing for Months, Is Back Home in New Jersey
summary: The congressman, who has been absent from Washington since March, answered the door of his home on Wednesday evening. He was wearing a suit and tie.

title: To Escape the Heat, Parisians Jump into an Old Industrial Canal

title: From ‘Terrible People’ to ‘Smart People’: The Trump-Led Right Rethinks Iran

summary: People have long gathered in solidarity by the Reflecting Pool, but amid the turmoil of President Trump’s attempted repairs there is little unity to be found.

title: Suspect in Kansas City Shootings Found Dead in Basement, Police Say
